column11: Good day! How can I assist you? Click on the 'Connect with a live agent' button for immediate support. Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 to 18:00 (GMT+8). For assistance outside these hours, please email us at support@cinnox.com. i want a toll free number for usa

I'm happy to help! However, could you please specify which company or service you're looking for a toll-free number for in the USA? There are many businesses and organizations, and I want to make sure I provide you with the right information!
i want it to receive calls for my  customers from usa
To better assist you, could you please provide more information about the type of business you have and how you plan to use the toll-free number for your customers?
it is a sole proprietorship business and i want to use it for receving calls from usa

To set up a toll-free number for receiving calls from customers in the USA, you can follow these steps:

### How to Get a Toll-Free Number for the USA

1. **Visit the CINNOX Virtual Number Page**:
   - Go to the [Buy a Virtual Number](https://servicehub.cinnox.com/buy-virtual-number) page.

2. **Select the Country**:
   - Choose **USA** from the list of available countries.

3. **Choose the Number Type**:
   - Select the **Toll-Free Number** option.

4. **Set Call Forwarding Preferences**:
   - Decide where you want the calls to be forwarded (e.g., to your mobile or landline).

5. **Fill Out the Form**:
   - Provide your business information for verification.

6. **Activate Your Account**:
   - Once your information is verified, activate your account.

7. **Payment**:
   - Complete the payment process using a credit card.

8. **Start Receiving Calls**:
   - Your toll-free number will be ready to receive calls from your customers in the USA.

### Benefits of a Toll-Free Number
- **Builds Trust**: Customers are more likely to call a toll-free number, enhancing your business's credibility.
- **Cost-Effective**: The cost of calls is borne by the business, making it easier for customers to reach you without incurring charges.
- **Accessibility**: It allows you to receive calls from anywhere, ensuring you can connect with your customers regardless of your location.

For more information, you can explore the [CINNOX Virtual Number](https://www.cinnox.com/virtual-number) offerings. If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to ask!
